title: Selling Stock Photos Without PayPal: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: PayPal and Stripe do not make their exclusion lists public. They do not send you a letter explaining why your country is blocked. You find out when your account gets flagged, your funds get held for 180 days, or your application is rejected with a generic error message. Gumroad has payout delays that stretch to 30 days for sellers in certain regions, and Payhip quietly limits withdrawal options based on geography. These are not edge cases — they are the designed experience for creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Kenya, Ethiopia, and dozens of other countries. The solution is not a workaround. It is a different infrastructure stack entirely: crypto payments through NOWPayments, automated delivery, and a store that no platform can suspend because no platform owns it.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are popular payment processors, but they have strict geographic restrictions that block creators in certain countries. PayPal, for example, restricts access to 22 countries, while Stripe restricts access to 26 countries. Gumroad and Payhip have their own lists of blocked countries. When you try to use these platforms, you'll be met with a 'country not supported' message or a 'KYC not verified' error. But what if you had a payment processor that didn't discriminate based on your location or banking situation?
How They Handle Restricted Countries

The truth is, traditional payment processors have no incentive to support creators in restricted countries. They're more focused on protecting themselves from potential risks than on helping you get paid. When you're blocked from using these platforms, you're forced to look for workarounds, which often come with additional fees or security risks. But what if you could bypass these restrictions altogether and sell your digital products without worrying about getting blocked?
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Traditional payment processors often charge high fees, especially for international transactions. They may also take a percentage of your earnings, leaving you with less money in your pocket. But when you use a payment processor that doesn't discriminate based on your location, you can avoid these fees and keep more of your hard-earned cash. With NOWPayments, for example, you can get instant automated delivery of your digital products, and you'll never have to worry about getting blocked or charged excessive fees.
Traditional payment processors prioritize their own interests over yours.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Manual delivery of digital products can be a nightmare, especially when you're selling stock photos. But what if you could automate the entire process and get instant delivery? With NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, you can create a seamless checkout experience for your customers, and you'll never have to worry about manually sending files or dealing with customer support requests.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're a digital creator in a restricted country, you have options. With NOWPayments and Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle, you can bypass traditional payment processors and get instant automated delivery of your digital products. But if you're unsure about which option to choose, start by assessing your needs and budget. Consider the fees, payment speed, and automation capabilities of each option, and choose the one that best fits your situation.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
NOWPayments is the only payment processor that doesn't discriminate based on your location or banking situation.
